title: payment watcher silently drops confirmed payment if invoice already expired
description: scan_block calls get_invoice_by_address which filters expires_at > datetime(now). If payment confirms on-chain after invoice expires_at, the invoice is not found and code takes Ok(None) => continue. Payment is silently lost — subscriber paid but receives no subscription. purge_expired_invoices also deletes the row every 100 blocks, preventing manual recovery.
